title: amatlania pellucida var. pectinata
intro: Amatlania pellucida var. pectinata, also known as the "Yellow Ginger Lily", is a plant species native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Amatlania pellucida var. pectinata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used externally as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
